23rd SOSP 2011: Cascais, Portugal

Key-value

  • Hyeontaek Lim, Bin Fan, David G. Andersen, Michael Kaminsky: SILT: a memory-efficient, high-performance key-value store. 1-13
  • Giuseppe DeCandia: Dynamo: Amazon's highly available key-value store. 14-26

Storage

  • Sage Weil, Scott Brandt: Ceph: a scalable, high-performance distributed file system. 27-42

Security

  • Frank McKeen, Ilya Alexandrovich: Innovative instructions and software model for isolated execution. 43-56
